Records.authors: Marzucca, Robin, McLeod, Andrew J., Nega, Christoph
Records.description: Two-loop integral family for mixed QCD-EW corrections to $gg \to H$ at $\mathcal{O}(g^3 g_s^2)$. This family has two top-level topologies (the hexagonal graph with a massive $M$ line, and a triangle-bubble topology) and contains the elliptic two-mass sunrise integral as a subtopology. Depends on $s$, $m_t$, and a second mass $M$ (which can be $m_H$, $m_W$, or $m_Z$). Contains 30 master integrals computed through $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^2)$ (weight 6). The elliptic sector is governed by the sunrise elliptic curve with period $\varpi_0$ and two additional transcendental functions $G_1, G_2$ defined as iterated integrals over $\varpi_0$. Results expressed as iterated integrals over 24 algebraic and 28 elliptic integration kernels. Numerically cross-checked against AMFlow to 13 digits for elliptic integrals and 40 digits for polylogarithmic subsectors.
